message:
fix(serve-stdio): disable tool debug logging to prevent protocol corruption

Tool debug panels (gated by TOOLS_LOG_ENABLED) output to stdout using
Rich Console. In stdio mode, stdout is reserved for the MCP JSON-RPC
protocol, so any extraneous output would corrupt the transport.

This fix sets TOOLS_LOG_ENABLED=false and clears the settings cache
before building the server, ensuring clean stdio communication.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -623,9 +623,16 @@ def serve_stdio() -> None:
     without requiring a separate HTTP server.
 
     Note: All logging is redirected to stderr to avoid corrupting the stdio protocol.
+    Tool debug panels are automatically disabled in stdio mode.
     """
     import logging
 
+    from .config import clear_settings_cache
+
+    # Disable tool debug logging - it outputs to stdout and would corrupt the protocol
+    os.environ["TOOLS_LOG_ENABLED"] = "false"
+    clear_settings_cache()
+
     # Redirect all logging to stderr to avoid corrupting stdio transport
     for handler in logging.root.handlers[:]:
         logging.root.removeHandler(handler)
